'''mazuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whangdoodle|whangdoodle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whangdoodle|whangdoodle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mazuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæziyith|mæziyith]] || [[word:mæziyij|mæziyij]] || [[word:mæziyish|mæziyish]] || [[word:mæziyi|mæziyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazuzuyuth|mazuzuyuth]] || [[word:mazuzuyuj|mazuzuyuj]] || [[word:mazuzuyush|mazuzuyush]] || [[word:mazuzuyu|mazuzuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazuyuth|mazuyuth]] || [[word:mazuyuj|mazuyuj]] || [[word:mazuyush|mazuyush]] || [[word:mazuyu|mazuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazufyuth|mazufyuth]] || [[word:mazufyuj|mazufyuj]] || [[word:mazufyush|mazufyush]] || [[word:mazufyuf|mazufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazuyuthu|mazuyuthu]] || [[word:mazuyuju|mazuyuju]] || [[word:mazuyushu|mazuyushu]] || [[word:mazuyuku|mazuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazuyuth|mazuyuth]] || [[word:mazuyuj|mazuyuj]] || [[word:mazuyush|mazuyush]] || [[word:mazuyu|mazuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazuyuthul|mazuyuthul]] || [[word:mazuyujul|mazuyujul]] || [[word:mazuyushul|mazuyushul]] || [[word:mazuyukul|mazuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazuyuthuthu|mazuyuthuthu]] || [[word:mazuyujuju|mazuyujuju]] || [[word:mazuyushushu|mazuyushushu]] || [[word:mazuyuku|mazuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazuyuthun|mazuyuthun]] || [[word:mazuyujun|mazuyujun]] || [[word:mazuyushun|mazuyushun]] || [[word:mazuyukun|mazuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazuyuthuoro|mazuyuthuoro]] || [[word:mazuyujuoro|mazuyujuoro]] || [[word:mazuyushuoro|mazuyushuoro]] || [[word:mazuyukuoro|mazuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
